components.scope: AgentDojo repository code and agentdojo 0.1.35 wheel
components.notes: The root license and package classifier identify the repository software as MIT; retain the copyright and permission notice.

components.scope: task PROMPT and GOAL definitions plus suite environment YAML
components.notes: No separate data-license declaration or third-party data notice was found at the pin; repository-level MIT licensing is not treated as a conclusive data-rights determination for a derived dataset.

components.scope: PromptSec-FM AgentDojo definition snapshot and derived dataset records
components.notes: The snapshot and records reproduce task text and remain local reconstruction artifacts pending an explicit data-rights review.
Runtime results are not downloaded, inspected by the importer, included in snapshots, or represented as scientific ground truth.

constraints: Pin package 0.1.35, benchmark v1.2.2, and Git revision a75aba7631d3ca5fb7ab938965c97ead2f9ff84b together.
Generate the local snapshot only through the public get_suites API without executing attacks, tools, defenses, benchmarks, or model calls.
Do not redistribute task text, suite states, snapshots, or derived JSONL payloads until data rights are reviewed.
Do not acquire or import the runs directory or any model-output archive.
Preserve source task identifiers and describe security_case_id as a PromptSec-FM identifier derived from the upstream task pair.
citations: Debenedetti et al. (2024). AgentDojo: A Dynamic Environment to Evaluate Prompt Injection Attacks and Defenses for LLM Agents. NeurIPS 2024 Datasets and Benchmarks Track.
